versions.version_description: This chart is Based from the original track.
Record accurate chord progression with included imagined harmonization of the bass notes.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This is just what I like to play, fits with the original key.

[Hook]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]          
A few times I've been around that track[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E7[/ch]
So it's not just gonna happen like that[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
Because I ain't no hollaback girl[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]E7[/ch]
I ain't no hollaback girl [x2][/tab]

[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]E7[/ch]
Ooooh ooh, this my shit, this my shit [x4][/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]
I heard that you were talking shit[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E7[/ch]
And you didn't think that I would hear it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]
People hear you talking like that, getting everybody fired up[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                     [ch]F#m[/ch]
So I'm ready to attack, gonna lead the pack[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]E7[/ch]
Gonna get a touchdown, gonna take you out[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]
That's right, put your pom-poms downs, getting everybody fired up[/tab]

[Hook]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]          
A few times I've been around that track[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E7[/ch]
So it's not just gonna happen like that[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
Because I ain't no hollaback girl[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]E7[/ch]
I ain't no hollaback girl [x2][/tab]

[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]    [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]E7[/ch]
Ooooh ooh, this my shit, this my shit [x4][/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                        [ch]F#m[/ch]            
So that's right dude, meet me at the bleachers[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]E7[/ch]
No principals,no student-teachers[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                 [ch]E7[/ch]
Both of us want to be the winner, but there can only be one[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]F#m[/ch]
So I'm gonna fight, gonna give it my all[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]E7[/ch]
Gonna make you fall, gonna sock it to you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]E7[/ch]
That's right I'm the last one standing, another one bites the dust[/tab]

[Hook]
[tab]  [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]          
A few times I've been around that track[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]E7[/ch]

[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
Because I ain't no hollaback girl[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]E7[/ch]
I ain't no hollaback girl [x2][/tab]

[Refrain]

Ooooh ooh, this my shit, this my shit [x4][/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab]                          [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]
Let me hear you say this shit is bananas[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E7[/ch]
B-A-N-A-N-A-S[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]F#m[/ch]
(This shit is bananas)[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]E7[/ch]
(B-A-N-A-N-A-S)[/tab]

Again
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]
This shit is bananas[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]E7[/ch]
B-A-N-A-N-A-S[/tab]
